nasb.text: In the evening she would go in and in the morning she would return to the second harem, to the custody of Shaashgaz, the king’s eunuch who was in charge of the concubines. She would not again go in to the king unless the king delighted in her and she was summoned by name.

esv.text: In the evening she would go in, and in the morning she would return to the second harem in custody of Shaashgaz, the king’s eunuch, who was in charge of the concubines. She would not go in to the king again, unless the king delighted in her and she was summoned by name.

cnv.text: 她晚上進去，次日早晨回到第二女院去，交給管理妃嬪的沙甲，就是王的太監；除非王喜悅她，題名召她，她就不再進去見王。

ccb.text: 她晚上进去，次日被带到另一个女宫，交给管理妃嫔的太监沙甲。除非王喜欢她，提名召见她，否则她不会再见到王。
